title: Xenial Hearty Mediterranean Beef Shin Stew
description: A sweet and pillowy Mediterranean stew featuring beef shin, perfect for a hangover cure, made with robata-grilled beef and high-protein ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef shin pieces with salt and black pepper.
Grill the beef shin pieces for 5 minutes per side, or until browned.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine, beef broth, tomato paste, and dried oregano to the pot, stirring to combine.
Add the grilled beef shin pieces and bay leaves to the pot, bringing the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2.5 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the bay leaves and serve hot.
